scope_note: Official documentation proves platform capability only. It does not prove the feature is enabled, selected, implemented, responsive-valid, or production-ready for a project run.

capabilities.responsive_behavior: official docs include responsive editing topics; project use remains unproven
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: enabled in user project, correct architecture, Builder execution, Responsive completion

capabilities.architect_allowed_use: name candidate element families with evidence labels
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: that a screenshot requires Atomic Elements

capabilities.official_name: Classes, Local Classes, Global Classes, Class Manager, Style Precedence
known_limitations: precedence and class order are project-context sensitive
capabilities.architect_allowed_use: propose class intent and naming boundaries
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: final precedence, enabled class workflow, or implemented CSS

applicable_elements: style properties supported by Elementor docs
known_limitations: property-family support must be checked per project
capabilities.architect_allowed_use: record design-system intent as candidate only
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: variables exist or are imported/exported in a project

capabilities.official_name: Interactions, Dynamic Tags, Nested Links, Attributes
known_limitations: project data and Pro availability not inferred
capabilities.architect_allowed_use: mark as possible only with explicit evidence
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: clickability, dynamic data, or interaction behavior from screenshot alone

capabilities.official_name: RTL behavior, logical properties, SVG styling constraints
known_limitations: SVG meaningful text is not acceptable without authorization
capabilities.architect_must_not_assume: runtime RTL correctness or SVG editability

per_run_source_ledger_policy: A run ledger must cite only capabilities actually consulted or used. Do not copy the full registry into every run.
